product: Jess Trading Bot — Range Breakout Bot for MetaTrader 5 (XAUUSD + EURUSD, GBPUSD, USDJPY, EURJPY)

prompts.prompt: Premium fintech aesthetic on Carbon Black radial gradient background (#101010 center fading to #010101). Bold Inter-style sans-serif typography in white for headlines, Light Gray #D7D7D7 for secondary text, Neon Green #A5F28C for profit numbers and key highlights, Electric Blue #2979FF exclusively for CTA buttons. Minimalist composition with generous negative space, Apple keynote-inspired lighting. Candlestick chart and algorithmic trading motifs. Mood: sophisticated, trustworthy, futuristic. No hype, no clutter. Create: a static ad with a Carbon Black radial gradient background (#101010 center to #010101 edges). Top third: large bold white sans-serif headline reading "Your Bot Trades Gold While You Sleep". Below in smaller Light Gray #D7D7D7 text: "Automated XAUUSD trading — 24/7 execution, zero emotions, proven strategy.". Bottom half: a sleek laptop screen angled slightly, displaying a candlestick chart with green (#A5F28C) candles trending upward and a visible profit line. Soft moody lighting from the screen glow. Jess Trading logo bottom right in white. Clean, authoritative, premium fintech. 4:5 aspect ratio.
prompts.notes: Core headline test. Tests text rendering quality.

Bold Inter-style sans-serif typography in white for headlines, Light Gray #D7D7D7 for secondary text, Neon Green #A5F28C for profit numbers and key highlights, Electric Blue #2979FF exclusively for CTA buttons. Minimalist composition with generous negative space, Apple keynote-inspired lighting. Candlestick chart and algorithmic trading motifs. Mood: sophisticated, trustworthy, futuristic. No hype, no clutter. Create: a side-by-side comparison ad divided vertically into two equal halves. Left half: muted dark red-tinted (#1a1010) background. Header: "Manual Trading" in gray text. Below: illustration of a tired person staring at multiple screens, stressed expression, red chart going down. Below: vertical stack of 4 problems, each with a red circle X: "Emotional decisions", "Limited to market hours", "Inconsistent results", "Constant screen time" in gray text. Right half: Carbon Black (#101010) background with subtle Neon Green (#A5F28C) edge glow. Header: "Jess Trading Bot" in Neon Green. Below: illustration of a calm person on their phone at a cafe, green chart going up on a laptop behind them. Below: vertical stack of 4 benefits, each with a Neon Green circle checkmark: "100% disciplined execution", "Trades 24/7 nonstop", "Backtested strategy", "Set it and forget it" in white text. Center divider: a "VS" in white circle. 1:1 aspect ratio.
prompts.notes: Visual comparison with strong color contrast.

Center: a stylized dark illustration of a laptop displaying a trading dashboard with candlestick charts and a green profit curve. prompts.prompt: Do NOT use ad layouts or polish. This should look completely native and organic. Create: a casual selfie of a man in mid-20s, hoodie, at a desk with monitors behind him, taken with iPhone front camera, slightly grainy, indoor lighting. Overlaid in the center of the frame: a realistic screenshot of a Reddit-style post in "r/algotrading" with a username and timestamp. Post title in bold: "Why are people still manually trading in 2025?". Post body: "Genuine question. Automated systems don't sleep, don't panic-sell, don't FOMO into bad entries. If you already have a strategy, why sit there staring at charts all day instead of letting it run? Curious what people actually think.". The person looks like he's reacting to it — NOT selling a product. No product visible, no brand logo, no CTA. The hook is the opinion. 9:16 aspect ratio.
prompts.notes: UGC reaction to an opinion post — no fabricated product reviews, no branding.

prompts.prompt: Premium fintech aesthetic on Carbon Black radial gradient background (#101010 center fading to #010101). Bold Inter-style sans-serif typography in white for headlines, Light Gray #D7D7D7 for secondary text, Neon Green #A5F28C for profit numbers and key highlights, Electric Blue #2979FF exclusively for CTA buttons. Minimalist composition with generous negative space, Apple keynote-inspired lighting. Candlestick chart and algorithmic trading motifs. Mood: sophisticated, trustworthy, futuristic. Below: four horizontal rows spanning full width, each divided 50/50 by a thin Neon Green vertical line and separated by thin dark gray horizontal lines. prompts.prompt: Do NOT use ad layouts or polish. This must look like a real person's Instagram Story. Create: a casual iPhone photo of a man's hands typing on a laptop at a clean desk with a second monitor showing trading charts in the background. Natural overhead daylight, slightly warm, iPhone quality. Scattered across the frame: 5 text bubbles using Instagram Story's built-in highlighted text tool, varied highlight colors between bubbles. Bubble 1: "algo trading" large and bold. Bubble 2: "most traders lose to emotions — not strategy". Bubble 3: "this bot trades the breakout 24/7 with zero emotion, and you don't need to code anything". Bubble 4: "set it up in 10 min, finally following my own plan". Bubble 5: "@jesstrading". Should feel casual and hand-placed, not designed. 9:16 aspect ratio.
prompts.notes: Instagram Story native feel. Removed 'legit'/'consistent results' endorsement claims.

prompts.prompt: Create: a static ad designed to look like a real online finance news article screenshot. Top 25%: dark background with a realistic financial publication masthead in bold white serif text "MARKETS INSIDER" (do NOT use real publication names — this is a fictional masthead). Below: thin gray horizontal rule. Small gray text "Latest" left-aligned. Then: bold white serif headline spanning full width: "'It changed how I trade': The $147 trading bot with hundreds of five-star reviews". Bottom 60%: two side-by-side photos — one of a person smiling at their phone showing green trading charts in warm natural light, one of a laptop with a candlestick chart in a home office, both in casual lighting. Photos should look like real submissions, not studio. No brand logo. No CTA. Should look like an organic article screenshot. 4:5 aspect ratio.
prompts.notes: DO NOT USE until real reviews/press exist — fake masthead + 'hundreds of reviews' (Meta/legal risk). Kept for reference only.

prompts.prompt: Do NOT include any product, logo, or branding. Create: a scroll-stopping curiosity ad designed to look like a truncated social media post. Top 35%: Carbon Black (#101010) background with large bold white sans-serif text (heavy weight, tight leading): "90% of traders lose money. The other 10% stopped trading manually. Here's what they do instead...". The last few words followed by "...more" in lighter gray text, mimicking a truncated Facebook/Instagram caption that requires clicking "more" to expand. Bottom 65%: a slightly overhead photo of a person at a desk, laptop open showing red trading charts, head in hands, frustrated expression, dim moody lighting. Photo should feel real and editorial, not stock. Slightly shallow depth of field. No text on the photo. No product. No logo. No CTA. The entire purpose is to provoke curiosity and earn the click. 1:1 aspect ratio.
prompts.notes: Pure curiosity bait. No branding at all.

prompts.prompt: Create: a lifestyle photo set in a home office or desk setup. Soft natural daylight from a nearby window, slightly warm, naturally blurred background showing a monitor with trading charts. Frame is slightly off-center — feels found rather than composed. Slight natural sensor grain consistent with a phone camera. Center of frame: a laptop or monitor screen displaying a candlestick chart with green candles trending up. Stuck on the screen: a yellow square post-it note, slightly crooked. Realistic paper texture with a horizontal crease. Subtle curl at bottom-right corner. Held with a small piece of clear tape, slightly wrinkled. Handwritten in thick black marker, imperfect lowercase: "set up the bot" line break "went to sleep" line break "it traded the breakout all night" line break with a surprised emoji. No brand logo anywhere. Bottom center on a plain off-white strip: small plain lowercase sans-serif caption: "jesstrading.xyz — automated breakout trading". Casual, authentic, intriguing. 4:5 aspect ratio.
prompts.notes: Post-it pattern interrupt. Domain .xyz, no guaranteed-profit punchline.

prompts.prompt: Create: a clean results-showcase ad LAYOUT built to frame a REAL verified-performance screenshot (the founder's actual MyFXBook account). Carbon Black (#101010) background. Top: bold white sans-serif headline "Live, verified results — check them yourself." with "verified" in Neon Green (#A5F28C). Center: a large rounded browser/device frame placeholder where the real MyFXBook screenshot will be composited in — do NOT generate, invent, or draw any numbers, charts, percentages, or equity curves; leave a clean empty framed placeholder area for the real screenshot. Below the frame: an Electric Blue #2979FF text-link element reading "Verify on MyFXBook". Bottom: Light Gray disclaimer "Trading involves risk. Past performance does not guarantee future results." Jess Trading logo bottom right in white. 4:5 aspect ratio.
prompts.notes: REAL PROOF AD. Composite the founder's actual MyFXBook screenshot into the frame manually (or via image-edit) — never let the model invent the numbers. Strongest, fully-honest ad.

prompts.prompt: This should feel human and credible, NOT a polished ad. Create: a portrait-style ad of the founder. A real-feeling photo of a man at a clean desk with a monitor showing MetaTrader 5 charts behind him, natural lighting, smart-casual, direct confident eye contact with the camera — approachable, not flashy. Carbon Black (#101010) negative space on one side for text. Overlaid in bold white sans-serif with key words in Neon Green (#A5F28C): "I built this bot because I kept breaking my own rules.". Below in Light Gray: "— Jess, founder. Range breakout automation for MT5.". Small Jess Trading logo. Premium but human. 4:5 aspect ratio.
prompts.notes: Founder/human ad — the brand gets a face. Use a real photo of Jess if possible. Highest trust-builder for skeptical traders.

prompts.prompt: Premium fintech aesthetic on Carbon Black radial gradient background (#101010 center fading to #010101). Bold Inter-style sans-serif typography. Neon Green #A5F28C for highlights. Minimalist, premium, no hype. Create: an educational diagram ad on Carbon Black (#101010) background explaining the strategy in 3 clean steps. Top: white sans-serif headline "How the breakout system works". Center: a horizontal 3-step flow connected by thin Neon Green (#A5F28C) arrows. Step 1: a small candlestick chart with a highlighted box labeled "1. It records the daily range". Step 2: two pending-order lines above and below the box, labeled "2. Places Buy Stop + Sell Stop". Step 3: one line triggering with a green breakout candle and the other cancelling, labeled "3. Breakout triggers, the other cancels". Below the flow: Light Gray text "All positions close at the session end. No black box — you see exactly what it does.". Jess Trading logo bottom right in white. 1:1 aspect ratio.
prompts.notes: Educational — explains the real mechanic. Builds trust with intermediate traders; positions the bot as transparent, not a black box.

prompts.prompt: Premium fintech aesthetic on Carbon Black radial gradient background (#101010 center fading to #010101). Bold Inter-style sans-serif typography. Neon Green #A5F28C for the key line. Minimalist, premium, anti-hype. Create: a contrarian, confident typography ad on Carbon Black (#101010) background. No imagery — text does the work. Top: oversized bold white sans-serif headline reading "This won't make you rich.". Below, in Neon Green (#A5F28C), a second heavy line: "It removes your worst trades.". Below in Light Gray regular weight: "No hype. No guaranteed returns. Just a backtested breakout system that follows the rules you can't always follow yourself — 24/7, with zero emotion.". Bottom: a small dark badge "Lifetime Access | $147" with Neon Green border, and the Jess Trading logo. Bottom edge: Light Gray disclaimer "Trading involves risk. Past performance does not guarantee future results.". 1:1 aspect ratio.
